overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a futuristic city in heavy rain. The player drives across elevated highways, through covered tunnels, and past neon-lit commercial districts while following traffic through wet, reflective streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway bridge with blue marked lanes

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on a multi-lane bridge in heavy rain, following a red vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead in the same lane with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: yellow and black striped concrete barriers lining the left edge of the bridge
bright blue painted lane markings on the wet asphalt surface
large white suspension cables extending upward into the foggy sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated highway bridge during a heavy rainstorm. The vehicle drives along blue-marked lanes flanked by yellow and black striped barriers, with large suspension cables visible through the rain ahead. The windshield wipers actively clear rain as the vehicle follows a red sedan through the misty atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway tunnel with green sound barriers

events.description: vehicle enters covered highway section with green walls, transitioning from open rain to sheltered tunnel environment
lighting shifts from natural overcast to artificial fluorescent tube lights along the tunnel walls

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the covered highway section, navigating moderate traffic in the enclosed space

notable_agents.action: tan sedan overtaking on the left side in the opposing lane

entered.detail: tall green paneled walls lining both sides of the covered highway
horizontal white fluorescent light strips mounted at intervals on the green walls
concrete overhead structure with periodic gaps showing the sky above

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered highway tunnel with distinctive green sound-barrier walls illuminated by fluorescent tube lights. The enclosed space blocks the rain while maintaining the wet road surface. A tan sedan overtakes on the left as the vehicle progresses through the artificially lit corridor toward the distant tunnel exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban highway canyon with overhead structures and emerging neon signage

events.description: exiting the covered tunnel back into open air with heavy rain and urban buildings becoming visible
return to natural diffused daylight with neon signs and digital billboards becoming visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: accelerating slightly as the vehicle exits the tunnel, approaching a more dense urban area with taller buildings

entered.detail: tall modern glass buildings visible through the rain on the left side
enclosed pedestrian walkway crossing over the highway with glass walls
large illuminated advertising screens mounted on building facades

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the vehicle returns to the rain-soaked open air of an urban canyon. Modern glass office towers rise on the left while an overhead pedestrian bridge spans the highway ahead. Digital billboards begin to appear on the right, signaling the transition into a more commercial district as the rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk commercial district with neon market stalls under elevated highways

events.description: vehicle slows and driver looks right toward a street market area with blue tarps and red neon lighting
vehicle executes a right turn at the intersection onto a street lined with yellow barriers

agents.ego_description: slowing down to navigate a right turn through a dense commercial intersection, briefly observing a street market on the right side

notable_agents.action: pedestrians standing near market stalls with umbrellas visible under the overpass

entered.detail: street vendors with blue tarp coverings illuminated by red neon lights underneath the highway overpass
large orange structural columns supporting the elevated highway above
red and black checkered painted sections of the road surface marking the intersection
bright yellow metal railings along the sidewalk edge near the market area

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dense commercial district beneath an elevated highway, characterized by orange support pillars and red-painted road sections. The driver glances right at a street market with blue tarps and neon lighting where pedestrians gather under umbrellas. After slowing, the vehicle makes a right turn at the intersection, passing the market area.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial city street with elevated highways and digital advertisements

events.description: completing the turn onto a new street with palm trees and different commercial architecture visible

agents.ego_description: driving along a commercial street lined with digital billboards, palm trees, and elevated highway structures

notable_agents.action: white sedan parked or moving slowly on the left side of the street near the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right sidewalk suggesting a warmer climate zone
curved elevated highway structure with vehicles visible traveling above
tall standalone digital billboard showing animated character advertisement
temporary yellow barrier fencing along the right sidewalk construction area

segments.scene_description: After the turn, the vehicle proceeds along a commercial city street featuring palm trees and elevated highway ramps. Digital advertising kiosks display animated content on the right, while yellow construction fencing lines the sidewalk. The rain continues to create reflective surfaces on the asphalt as the vehicle moves past various commercial buildings and infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive from a rain-swept elevated highway into the neon-lit density of a commercial city district. It begins on a misty bridge where windshield wipers clear heavy rain as the vehicle follows a red sedan past suspension cables and striped barriers. The scene then shifts into a covered tunnel, replacing the storm with the artificial glow of fluorescent lights and green sound-barrier walls before emerging back into the open air of an urban canyon flanked by glass towers and pedestrian bridges. As the vehicle descends beneath an elevated highway, the environment transforms into a crowded commercial zone with orange pillars and a blue-tarped street market where pedestrians huddle under umbrellas. Finally, after making a right turn, the camera glides along a reflective city street lined with palm trees, animated advertising kiosks, and yellow construction fencing.
